gate_measurement_note: Suite results below were captured by the 2026-05-04 gate run against the working tree that produced commits 865b892..55cd351. That tree is now committed verbatim as HEAD; no product-code drift between the measurement and HEAD. Per workspace rules, this is the gate run for HEAD = 55cd351.

unit_tests.note: 1 skipped = R runtime not installed (single_cell R-based dep). True failures = 0.

integration_tests.note: Default pytest mark filter excludes integration/e2e cases that need a live deployed backend; these 9 are the offline-runnable subset (golden-path TestClient flows).

evals.command: pytest tests/evals/ -q  (with HELIX_MOCK_MODE=0 via tests/evals/conftest.py, live OpenAI gpt-5.5)
evals.note: Threshold met (>= 0.90). 6 failures are routing-quality regressions clustered in plasmid/directed-evolution and quality_assessment routing — see worklog 2026-05-04 for triage list.

frontend_playwright.note: Visual snapshots regenerated for the May 2 → May 4 demo-scenarios growth (513 LOC added to demoScenarios.ts) and the CapabilityGrid empty-state replacement. Smoke tests verify the Server: healthy badge appears, command submission works, and file upload UI accepts CSV.

latency.note: p50 and p95 both well under thresholds. p50 +1.5s vs May 2 (14.3 → 15.8) is noise + LLM contention from the eval suite running in parallel. p99 outlier is a single 277s case (no p99 threshold defined). p95 is essentially flat (19.6 → 19.2).

require_fresh_frontend_build.evidence: Built locally with VITE_API_BASE_URL= (same-origin) on 2026-05-05; deployed to https://helix-beta.noricum-biosoft.com/ as index-Do3-fXHQ.js; live verification: 200 OK on /, 'helix--Publi' count = 0 in deployed bundle, /health returns status: healthy.

cleared_blockers.resolution: Built SPA locally with VITE_API_BASE_URL= (same-origin), shipped frontend/dist to EC2 i-0cc452521209457d4 via S3 presigned URL, atomically swapped into /opt/helix/frontend/dist. New bundle: index-Do3-fXHQ.js. nginx reloaded. Verified externally: 0 occurrences of helix--Publi in the live bundle, /health healthy. See worklog 2026-05-05.
Committed gate fixes as 4 commits (865b892, f6bf29d, d5ff850, 55cd351) and pushed 7a41660..55cd351 to origin/main. EC2 host then git-pulled to HEAD = 55cd351.

blockers.description: 1 unit test (single_cell R-based) skipped because Rscript runtime not installed. Carries over from May 2 baseline.
blockers.resolution: Install R runtime in CI/CD environment (no impact on Python-only release path).

blockers.description: 6 of 79 router evals regressed on the live LLM run on 2026-05-04. Plasmid/directed-evolution prompts misroute to mutate_sequence (3 cases); quality_assessment is shadowed by fastqc_quality_analysis (2 cases); plain 'cluster' word routes to clustering_analysis instead of bulk_rnaseq_analysis (1 case). Eval pass rate (92.4%) still meets the 90% threshold so this does not block release, but the regressions stem from the recent router rewrite (commit c1e1e18) and should be addressed in a follow-up before promoting beta to GA.
blockers.resolution: Triage in worklog 2026-05-04 § 'Router-quality regressions'. Likely fix is tightening the LLM router's tool-disambiguation prompt for plasmid vs mutate_sequence and adding a deterministic pre-router rule for plain 'cluster' (no FASTA) → no-route.

blockers.description: scripts/ec2/bootstrap-ec2.sh and scripts/ec2/update-from-git.sh assume Node/npm is installed on the EC2 host, but on the live beta box (Amazon Linux 2, glibc 2.26) it isn't and never has been: find / -maxdepth 5 -name npm returns nothing. Production deploys have implicitly relied on building the SPA off-host and shipping dist/ — same path used today. The documented deploy script will fail at the npm run build step on any AL2 host. Operational only; no impact on release behaviour.
blockers.resolution: Either (a) install Node on AL2 via the bootstrap's build-from-source path (slow, fragile), (b) migrate to AL2023 with newer glibc so NodeSource RPMs work, or (c) formalise the off-host build contract (build on CI / dev machine, ship dist/ via S3 + SSM) and remove the npm step from the on-host scripts. (c) is what is actually happening; recommend it. See worklog 2026-05-05 § 'Operational issues to fix before next deploy'.

readiness_note: All threshold checks pass, all gate suites are green, all release_requirements PASS, and both prior blockers are cleared. The gate run from 2026-05-04 measured the exact code that is now committed at HEAD (55cd351) — no product-code drift between measurement and HEAD. Live beta is verified functional with the same-origin bundle. The three remaining blockers in the list above are explicitly low/medium-severity follow-ups (R runtime, router-quality regressions inside the 0.90 eval threshold, AL2 deploy-script gap) and do not require action before this release.
